name: Average White Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, add milk.
2. Add flour to the milk and blend at high speed for 10-15 seconds until thoroughly mixed.
3. Add butter that has been cut into small pieces and cover.
4. Blend again for 10-15 seconds until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into the top of a double boiler and stir over simmering water until thickened.
6. Use a no-stick saucepan.
